name: Feature request / new source
about: Propose a feature, a new theme, or a new WorldMonitor source subset

labels: enhancement

## What & why

<!-- What should azimuth do that it doesn't today, and who benefits? -->

## If proposing a new data source

azimuth only surfaces sources that clear the bar (see CONTRIBUTING.md):

- [ ] WorldMonitor public API endpoint, reachable on the **free anonymous tier**
- [ ] A clear, compatible **license** + attribution (goes in `sources/registry.json` + `CREDITS.md`)
- [ ] Passes the **editorial line** — no investment advice, no safety/security predictions,
      no partisan political content
- [ ] Synthesisable into a neutral, fact-based brief
